episodes.title: Escaping a cult, Surviving a toxic marriage & She found her Purpose | Nyasha Munetsi
episodes.description:
In this Episode of Wisdom and Purpose with IME, we sit down with Nyasha Munetsi whose life becomes a battlefield. She opened up about how a coworker tried to initiate her into a cult, how she nearly lost her life at the hands of her Ex-husband. This is how she turned all that pain into something beautiful, 'Speak Out Voice it' (SOVI).

#imethefinest #podcast #interview
